name: Shooters Golf Lounge
about: Shooters Golf Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines technology with a social atmosphere. They provide top golf simulators and a variety of drinks to enhance the customer experience. The venue is designed to be welcoming for both golf enthusiasts and socializers, offering a space for practice, play, and relaxation with food and beverage options available.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-tier golf simulator technology for an authentic playing experience
Variety of drinks available to enhance the social aspect of the visit
Welcoming environment suitable for both focused practice and social gatherings
Convenient booking system for easy tee time reservations

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available for food service
Variety of drinks available to complement the golf experience

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-tier radar technology providing accurate ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue likely provides club rentals, though bringing your own clubs is recommended for the most familiar experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed as the venue has its own full kitchen and bar available for customers.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is Shooters Golf Lounge kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes children, making it suitable for family outings and junior golfers.
